title: Bed Bug Treatment in Kensington, Brooklyn | $1,200 – $3,500
metaDescription: Professional bed bug treatment in Kensington, Brooklyn. Effective heat and chemical solutions for brownstones, apartments, and homes. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Bed bugs are a growing concern for Kensington residents, affecting everything from historic brownstones to modern apartment buildings. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bed bug treatment services throughout Kensington, using proven heat and chemical methods to eliminate infestations completely. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges of Brooklyn's diverse housing stock and deliver fast, effective solutions.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Kensington and greater Brooklyn for years, with certified technicians who use EPA-approved treatments and cutting-edge technology. We offer same-day service, transparent pricing, and a satisfaction guarantee to ensure your home is bed bug-free.
localContext: Kensington's mix of pre-war apartment buildings, single-family homes, and proximity to Prospect Park and the busy Church Avenue corridor creates varied pest control needs. Our team is familiar with the neighborhood's architecture, from the classic brick buildings near Ocean Parkway to the row houses along tree-lined streets, ensuring tailored treatment for every property type.

faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Kensington?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Kensington typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method chosen. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use?
faqs.answer: We offer both heat treatment and targeted chemical applications. Heat treatment raises room temperature to levels that kill bed bugs at all life stages, while chemical treatments use EPA-approved pesticides. Our technicians will recommend the best approach based on your specific situation.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in a Kensington apartment?
faqs.answer: Treatment duration varies by property size and method. Heat treatments typically take 6-8 hours for an average apartment, while chemical treatments may require 2-3 hours plus follow-up visits. We work efficiently to minimize disruption to your daily routine.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day bed bug service in Kensington?
faqs.answer: Yes, we understand the urgency of bed bug problems and offer same-day inspections and treatment in Kensington when available. Call us early in the day for the best chance of same-day service, or we can schedule an appointment at your convenience.
